item.title: Acme AI raises $25M Series A to build developer tools
item.description: Acme AI, the startup behind an AI-powered code review tool at acme.ai, has raised a $25M Series A round led by Sequoia. The company plans to expand its engineering team.
item.author: reporter@techcrunch.com

item.title: DevStack secures $3M seed round for its Kubernetes platform
item.description: DevStack, a startup from devstack.io building a managed Kubernetes platform, secured a $3M seed round. They use Go and Terraform.

item.title: Fashion startup Glamify gets acquired by BigRetail Corp
item.description: Glamify, a fashion e-commerce company, was acquired today.
